mapper.sql: select c.campaign_id, c.merchant_id, m.company_name as merchant_name, c.product_id, c.trial_type, p.product_name, p.cover_url as product_cover_url, pc.category_code, pc.category_name, c.campaign_title, c.campaign_summary, c.target_count, (select count(1) from shop_trial_application a where a.campaign_id = c.campaign_id) as applicant_count, (select count(1) from shop_trial_application a where a.campaign_id = c.campaign_id and a.status in ('APPROVED', 'SHIPPED', 'RECEIVED', 'COMPLETED')) as approved_count, c.application_deadline, c.status as campaign_status, c.published_at, c.create_time as campaign_create_time, c.update_time as campaign_update_time from shop_trial_campaign c inner join shop_product p on p.product_id = c.product_id and p.del_flag = '0' inner join shop_product_category pc on pc.category_id = p.category_id inner join shop_merchant m on m.merchant_id = c.merchant_id and m.del_flag = '0'
mapper.select: where c.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and c.campaign_id = #{campaignId}
where c.campaign_id = #{campaignId} and c.status = 'RECRUITING' and c.application_deadline > sysdate() and m.audit_status = 'APPROVED' and m.status = '0' and p.status = 'ON_SALE' and pc.status = '0'

select count(1) from shop_trial_campaign c where c.product_id = #{productId} and c.trial_type = #{trialType} and c.status = 'RECRUITING' and c.application_deadline > sysdate() and (select count(1) from shop_trial_application a where a.campaign_id = c.campaign_id and a.status in ('APPROVED', 'SHIPPED', 'RECEIVED', 'COMPLETED')) < c.target_count
mapper.insert: insert into shop_trial_campaign (merchant_id, product_id, trial_type, campaign_title, campaign_summary, target_count, application_deadline, status, published_at, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time) values (#{merchantId}, #{productId}, #{trialType}, #{campaignTitle}, #{campaignSummary}, #{targetCount}, #{applicationDeadline}, #{status}, case when #{status} = 'RECRUITING' then sysdate() else null end, #{createBy}, sysdate(), #{updateBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_trial_campaign set status = #{toStatus}, published_at = case when #{toStatus} = 'RECRUITING' then sysdate() else published_at end, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where campaign_id = #{campaignId} and merchant_id = #{merchantId} and status = #{fromStatus}
mapper.select: select p.product_id from shop_product p inner join shop_trial_campaign c on c.product_id = p.product_id where c.campaign_id = #{campaignId} and c.merchant_id = #{merchantId} for update
select product_id from shop_product where product_id = #{productId} and merchant_id = #{merchantId} and del_flag = '0' for update
mapper.sql: select a.application_id, a.campaign_id, c.merchant_id, c.product_id, c.trial_type, p.product_name, c.campaign_title, a.shop_user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, a.apply_reason, a.recipient_name, a.recipient_phone, a.shipping_address, a.status as application_status, a.audit_remark, a.carrier, a.tracking_no, a.audit_time, a.shipped_at, a.received_at, a.completed_at, a.create_time as application_create_time, c.application_deadline from shop_trial_application a inner join shop_trial_campaign c on c.campaign_id = a.campaign_id inner join shop_product p on p.product_id = c.product_id inner join shop_user u on u.user_id = a.shop_user_id
mapper.select: where c.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and a.application_id = #{applicationId}
where a.shop_user_id = #{shopUserId} order by a.application_id desc
where a.shop_user_id = #{shopUserId} and a.application_id = #{applicationId}
select count(1) from shop_trial_application where campaign_id = #{campaignId} and shop_user_id = #{shopUserId}

select c.campaign_id from shop_trial_campaign c inner join shop_trial_application a on a.campaign_id = c.campaign_id where a.application_id = #{applicationId} and c.merchant_id = #{merchantId} for update
mapper.insert: insert into shop_trial_application (campaign_id, shop_user_id, apply_reason, recipient_name, recipient_phone, shipping_address, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{campaignId}, #{shopUserId}, #{applyReason}, #{recipientName}, #{recipientPhone}, #{shippingAddress}, 'APPLIED', sysdate(), sysdate())
mapper.update: update shop_trial_application a inner join shop_trial_campaign c on c.campaign_id = a.campaign_id left join ( select campaign_id, count(1) as approved_count from shop_trial_application where status in ('APPROVED', 'SHIPPED', 'RECEIVED', 'COMPLETED') group by campaign_id ) capacity on capacity.campaign_id = a.campaign_id set a.status = #{decision}, a.audit_remark = #{auditRemark}, a.audit_time = sysdate(), a.update_time = sysdate() where a.application_id = #{applicationId} and c.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and a.status = 'APPLIED' and (#{decision} = 'REJECTED' or coalesce(capacity.approved_count, 0) < c.target_count)

update shop_trial_application a inner join shop_trial_campaign c on c.campaign_id = a.campaign_id set a.status = 'SHIPPED', a.tracking_no = #{trackingNo}, a.shipped_at = sysdate(), a.update_time = sysdate() where a.application_id = #{applicationId} and c.merchant_id = #{merchantId} and c.trial_type = 'ONLINE' and a.status = 'APPROVED'

update shop_trial_application a inner join shop_trial_campaign c on c.campaign_id = a.campaign_id set a.status = 'RECEIVED', a.received_at = sysdate(), a.update_time = sysdate() where a.application_id = #{applicationId} and a.shop_user_id = #{shopUserId} and c.trial_type = 'ONLINE' and a.status = 'SHIPPED'
mapper.select: select count(1) from shop_verification_report where trial_application_id = #{trialApplicationId}
select count(1) from shop_verification_report where order_item_id = #{orderItemId}
mapper.insert: insert into shop_verification_report (product_id, trial_application_id, report_source, order_item_id, source_report_id, shop_user_id, experience, shortcoming, fit_crowd, recommend, product_quality, logistics_service, service_attitude, ai_score_status, ai_score_updated_at, status, published_at, create_time, update_time) values (#{productId}, #{trialApplicationId}, #{reportSource}, #{orderItemId}, #{sourceReportId}, #{shopUserId}, #{experience}, #{shortcoming}, #{fitCrowd}, #{recommend}, #{productQuality}, #{logisticsService}, #{serviceAttitude}, 'PENDING', sysdate(), 'PUBLISHED', sysdate(), sysdate(), sysdate())
insert into shop_verification_report_resource (report_id, resource_type, resource_url, resource_sort, create_time) values (#{reportId}, #{resourceType}, #{resourceUrl}, #{resourceSort}, sysdate())
mapper.sql: select r.report_id, r.product_id, p.product_name, p.subtitle as product_subtitle, p.detail as product_detail, p.cover_url as product_cover_url, p.merchant_id, m.company_name as merchant_name, pc.category_code, pc.category_name, r.trial_application_id, c.trial_type, r.report_source, r.order_item_id, r.source_report_id, r.shop_user_id, u.user_name, u.nick_name, r.experience, r.shortcoming, r.fit_crowd, r.recommend, r.product_quality, r.logistics_service, r.service_attitude, r.ai_score, r.ai_score_status, current_score.reason as ai_score_reason, r.ai_scored_at, r.status as report_status, r.published_at from shop_verification_report r inner join shop_product p on p.product_id = r.product_id inner join shop_merchant m on m.merchant_id = p.merchant_id inner join shop_product_category pc on pc.category_id = p.category_id inner join shop_user u on u.user_id = r.shop_user_id left join shop_trial_application a on a.application_id = r.trial_application_id left join shop_trial_campaign c on c.campaign_id = a.campaign_id left join shop_verification_report_ai_score current_score on current_score.score_id = r.current_ai_score_id and current_score.status = 'SUCCEEDED'
mapper.select: where r.report_id = #{reportId}
where r.shop_user_id = #{shopUserId} order by r.report_id desc
where p.merchant_id = #{merchantId} order by r.report_id desc
select count(1) from shop_verification_report_useful where report_id = #{reportId}
select count(1) from shop_verification_report_useful where report_id = #{reportId} and shop_user_id = #{shopUserId}
mapper.insert: insert ignore into shop_verification_report_useful (report_id, shop_user_id, create_time) values (#{reportId}, #{shopUserId}, sysdate())
mapper.delete: delete from shop_verification_report_useful where report_id = #{reportId} and shop_user_id = #{shopUserId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from shop_verification_report where shop_user_id = #{shopUserId} and status = 'PUBLISHED'

select count(1) from shop_verification_report_useful useful inner join shop_verification_report report on report.report_id = useful.report_id where report.shop_user_id = #{shopUserId} and report.status = 'PUBLISHED'
